query: Review this React form for our agency's benefit application against WCAG 2.2 AA — labels, error messaging, and focus management.
Make the multi-step wizard on our agency site fully keyboard navigable, with a visible focus indicator and a logical focus order.
Add proper ARIA and screen-reader announcements to the modal dialog and the live validation on our government form.
Our error messages just turn the field red. Make error handling accessible on this SG government form for screen-reader and low-vision users.
Ensure our agency page reflows and stays usable at 400% zoom and 320px width without loss of content, per WCAG 2.2 reflow.
Build an accessible date picker component for our government service that works with a keyboard and assistive tech.
We're building the UI for a new agency service. What accessibility should we bake in during implementation so we don't retrofit later?
Check that our navigation menu and skip links meet the Digital Service Standards accessibility controls for a Singapore government site.
Which DSS profile applies to our service given our traffic, and what control levels do we need?
Wire the axe and Oobee accessibility scanners into our GitHub Actions CI so regressions fail the build.
Add the Official Government Banner masthead and register the service on WOGAA for our new agency website.
Build the official footer with the mandatory gov.sg links and set up SGDS for our new service shell.
Configure the Content-Security-Policy and HSTS headers for our government web application.
Implement the Singpass login flow and Myinfo pre-fill on the sign-in page of our citizen service.
Add CodeQL SAST and dependency-scanning gates to our agency frontend's GitHub Actions so security regressions fail the build.
Review the form handling on our agency's benefit application for security — input validation, CSRF protection, and session expiry.
Make my personal portfolio website WCAG compliant — it's a static site I host myself, nothing to do with government.
Improve the accessibility of my startup's marketing landing page for a product launch.
Set up service-health monitoring and SLOs for our agency service's uptime and page-load performance.
Add MFA and SSO to the internal admin console our staff use to manage the system.
